# SQLite Amalgamation

This directory contains the official SQLite amalgamation package used by the
pure C++ knot-indexer-lab server for the generated `PD_m_3-16.sqlite` database.

Source package:

```text
sqlite-amalgamation-3530300.zip
```

SQLite is used only as an embedded storage engine; the original retrieval data
remains `data/name-pd/PD_m_3-16.sorted.txt`.
